arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in signing Premier League star as successor for Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: Barcelona have started to look at life after Robert Lewandowski. The Polish striker may still be one of the most prolific goalscorers in Europe, but he is now 36, meaning that his days at the top level will soon be coming to an end. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'agree deal' for Ter Stegen replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly have a deal in place to sign former Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny on a free transfer for the rest of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Barcelona forced to push back date for Spotify Camp Nou return
arts.sum: Barcelona have been working on the re-development of the Spotify Camp Nou since last June, and according to several reports, things have been progressing well. The idea has been for the first team to return to the stadium in December/January, but despite plenty of confidence, this is now no longer possible. Relevo have reported that […] The post Barcelona forced to push back date for Spotify Camp Nou return appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why is Marc-Andre Ter Stegen not playing for Barcelona today against Getafe in LaLiga?
arts.sum: Marc-Andre Ter Stegen will not play for Barcelona against Getafe today, Wednesday 25 September, as the goalkeeper suffered a serious knee injury in the side’s last game that will see him out for the rest of the season . This type of injury can take anywhere from 7 months to 9 months recovery time, with Ter Stegen now unlikely to play any part of the Barcelona season that had started in a hugely promising manner, seeing them win 6 games from 6 in the league.

arts.ttl: Barcelona agree deal to sign Wojciech Szczesny
arts.sum: According to transfer expert Fabrizio Romano, Barcelona have struck a deal with retired goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny to replace the German. Barcelona have agreed a deal to sign Wojciech Szczesny, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny addresses Barcelona rumours as goalkeeper 'closes in' on move
arts.sum: Ex-Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny is allegedly on the verge of joining Barcelona as a replacement for Marc-Andre ter Stegen.

arts.ttl: “It’d be disrespectful if I didn’t consider this” – Veteran goalkeepers opens up on Barcelona offer
arts.sum: Barcelona are expected to move for a new goalkeeper imminently, with it being confirmed that Marc-Andre Ter Stegen will be out for the remainder of the season because of the serious knee injury he sustained during the victory over Villarreal on Sunday. arts.ttl: Barcelona injury news: Eight players missing for Getafe contest
arts.sum: Barcelona will be missing eight first-team players for Thursday's La Liga clash against Getafe.

arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting XI against Getafe today in LaLiga
arts.sum: The surprising starting eleven that Hansi Flick fielded last Sunday against Villarreal (1-5) makes predicting Barça’s lineup for tonight’s match against Getafe ( watch at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT. This will be the first official match of the season for the Alicante-born goalkeeper, marking a pivotal opportunity in his career, as a strong start and a solid season as a starter could cement his place in the squad .

arts.ttl: Szczesny’s Barcelona move: A win-win for the player and Juventus
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny’s potential move to Barcelona has emerged as a surprising development following Marc-André ter Stegen’s serious injury. The former Juventus goalkeeper, who had previously announced his retirement, is now set to make a comeback to top-level football. This unexpected turn of events is poised to benefit both Szczesny and his former club, Juventus. Calciomercato report how the Polish goalkeeper’s decision to join Barcelona will likely bring a smile to Juventus’ financial department.
